page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.32xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 752 GB of system memory. Graphics acceleration is delivered by four NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPUs, providing a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions, and is equipped with a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps.

In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates strong multi-core performance, with a stress-ng multi-core CPU score of 123935.69. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 6856.96 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 253.9 GB/sec for large-block reads. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performance is in the top tier at 575.13 GB/sec, while single-threaded tasks like gzip compression and bzip3 decompression perform in the average range. Database operations are highly capable, as shown by a Redis SET throughput of 100.72 million operations per second.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a high-density resource profile. The combination of 128 dedicated cores and four enterprise-grade GPUs offers high compute density, though the lack of local NVMe storage means storage-heavy workloads must factor in the latency and cost of network-attached storage. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio and substantial network bandwidth make it a robust platform for distributed workloads, balancing high-throughput networking with massive parallel compute capabilities.

The ecs.gn7i-c32g1.32xlarge is designed for GPU-intensive and highly parallelized workloads. It is well-suited for deep learning inference, medium-scale AI model training, high-performance computing, video transcoding, and large-scale rendering pipelines. Additionally, its strong multi-threaded decompression and high Redis throughput make it suitable for memory-intensive data processing and high-throughput web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.32xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for high-performance parallel computing. It is equipped with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B cores operating at 2.9 GHz, 752 GB of system memory, and four NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPUs delivering 96 GB of total VRAM. The instance features a 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and relies entirely on external storage, as it contains no local disks. Benchmark results highlight strong multi-core CPU performance, high memory bandwidth, and top-tier multi-threaded decompression capabilities. Qualitatively, the server offers high resource density for compute and graphics-heavy tasks, though users must provision external storage. It is highly suited for deep learning inference, high-performance computing, video rendering, and large-scale data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.32xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 128 Intel Xeon cores, 752 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA A10 GPUs with 96 GB VRAM, optimized for parallel computing and AI workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.32xlarge features 128 Intel Xeon cores, 752 GB RAM, and 4 NVIDIA A10 GPUs for high-performance parallel computing.
tagline: A high-density GPU instance combining 128 dedicated Intel cores and four NVIDIA A10 accelerators for demanding parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPUs providing 96 GB of total VRAM.
128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B cores running at 2.9 GHz.
752 GB of system memory with strong read and write bandwidth.
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer.
No local storage, requiring external block storage configurations.
Best suited for AI inference, video rendering, and parallel HPC workloads.
